message:
🐛 Fix Safari PWA standalone mode and auth (#523)

- Add Safari-specific instructions: "File → Add to Dock"
- Detect Safari browser and standalone mode properly
- Remove auth requirement from /widget route (local monitoring)
- Safari's Add to Dock creates separate app that doesn't share cookies

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
